title: Show HN: Signet – Autonomous wildfire tracking from satellite and weather data
full_text:
Signet monitors satellite heat detections for fire activity near your area.
 

Get alerted when fire activity is detected nearby.

 

 

 

 

Optional: what best describes you?
 

 Just Curious
 Homeowner
 Agriculture / Forestry
 Public Sector
 Fire / Emergency
 Insurance
 Researcher
 
 

Thanks. That helps us understand who wants alerts.
